name: summarize
description: Search for relevant information in documents and provide a summarized answer.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project

document_id.description: Optional document ID to limit search scope

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10)

language.description: Language code for keyword extraction. 'ko' for Korean, 'en' for English, 'ja' for Japanese, 'zh' for Chinese.

name: overview
description: Get an overview of all documents in a project with their summaries.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project

name: graph_traverse
description: Find related pages by traversing entity connections in the knowledge graph. Provide qa_ids from document search results as starting points. Discovers additional pages linked through shared entities.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project

qa_ids.description: QA IDs from document search results to use as starting points for graph traversal

document_id.description: Optional document ID to limit search scope

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 30)

name: graph_keyword
description: Search the knowledge graph by keyword similarity. Finds core entities matching the query and returns connected pages.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project

query.description: The search query to match against graph keywords

document_id.description: Optional document ID to limit search scope

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 30)

name: rerank
description: Search for relevant information in documents and return results reranked by semantic relevance.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project

document_id.description: Optional document ID to limit search scope

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10)

language.description: Language code for keyword extraction. 'ko' for Korean, 'en' for English, 'ja' for Japanese, 'zh' for Chinese.
